tasks.subject: Re-run + log: Wan 2.1 14B i2v on RunPod+ComfyUI — i2v
tasks.description:
**DEFERRED.** New HTTP 404 regression in `ComfyUIBackend.result()` not present at Phase 28 (Layer P) closeout (b425407c). Pod `sapoahjqbgd331` (RTX A5000 @ $0.16/hr fallback after RTX 4090 capacity-unavailable retry) booted cleanly, workflow POSTed, but `/history/{id}` or `/view` returned 404 before the artifact materialised. Pod destroyed via raw `RUNPOD_TERMINATE_KEY` REST `DELETE /v1/pods/{id}` because the failed test never recorded the pod in the ledger. Spend ~$0.013 pod-wall.

Diagnostic trail in /tmp/task7-run.log (volatile — capture into fixtures before next session if revisiting).

Test prompt change landed at 5a6b34c (init-frame-aligned, replaces the cat-turns-into-a-woman morph that Phase 46 excluded).

Candidate causes:
  (a) kijai WanVideoWrapper pinned ref drift (`088128b224242e110d3906c6750e9a3a348a659b`) vs upstream behaviour
  (b) ComfyUI 0.3.10 /history polling shape change
  (c) VHS_VideoCombine custom node interaction

Needs its own investigation layer.
